title: nierembergia hatschbachii
intro: Nierembergia hatschbachii, also known as the 'Lily of the Incas', is a plant species belonging to the phytolaccaceae family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nierembergia hatschbachii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety in humans.
